notes.entry_mode: 90=buy at 90% of 52W high (anticipatory), 100=buy at 52W high breakout (classic), 110=buy at 110% of 52W high (confirmed breakout)
notes.trailing_stop_pct: Exit when price falls this % from peak
notes.floor_alert_threshold_pct: Only alert on floor updates if floor moves more than this % from last level
